bibl.title: Official Epistolography and the Language(s) of Power. Proceedings of the First International Conference of the Research Network Imperium & Officium, Comparative Studies in Ancient Bureaucracy and Officialdom, University of Vienna, 10-12 November 2010
bibl.publisher: Verlag der Österreichischen Akademie der Wissenschaften
bibl.seg: Stephan Procházka, Lucian Reinfandt & Sven Tost (edd.), Official Epistolography and the Language(s) of Power. Proceedings of the First International Conference of the Research Network Imperium & Officium, Comparative Studies in Ancient Bureaucracy and Officialdom, University of Vienna, 10-12 November 2010 = Österreichische Akademie der Wissenschaften. Philosophisch-historische Klasse. Documenta Antiqua. Papyrologica Vindobonensia. 8.
Wien, Verlag der Österreichischen Akademie der Wissenschaften, 2015, xxiv-336 pp., fig., 6 pll. ISBN 978-3-7001-7705-0.

Pp. vii-viii: Preface; - ix-xxiv: L.R., S.T. & Michael Jursa, Administrative Epistolography in Ancient Empires: An Introduction. - 22 contributions. - I. Epistolography in the Ancient Near East. - II. Epistolography in the Classical World. - III. Epistolography in Late Antiquity and Early Islam. - Index.
